title: Rantevou ston aera
actors: Rena Vlahopoulou, Kostas Voutsas, Martha Karagianni
plot: A hopeful Miss Europe 1966 and her girlfriends fall for an aircraftman and his friends. To be together, they take advantage of their commander's adoration for the famous actress, Rena Vlahopoulou. Who says no to a rendezvous with ...
